text:
黄昏に　沈む世に　
深く　深く　響き合う命よ

永遠の風に　吹かれて
安らかな夢を　胸に抱き眠れ…
気高き魂よ　すべて失くしても
遥か哀しみの果て　光を灯せよ

その地へ還るまで　紡ぐ君の詩
終わりのない　祈りを
紡ぐ絆よ　いつかたどり着くまで

傷跡に　刻まれた　
長い　長い　闘いの炎よ
時はただ癒すだろう　苦しみも痛みも

始まりへ　流れ行く星々は
燃える　その身尽きるまで
その涙　讃えよういつの日も
前だけを見つめ　歩みゆく命は
未来へと続く
消えない輝きよ　すべて包むように
誇り高くあれよと　導く君よ

ああ　時を超えていま　紡ぐ君の歌
終わりのない　祈りを
捧ぐ明日を　いつかたどり着くまで
気高き魂よ　すべて失くしても
遥か願い託して　紡ぐ絆よ
永久の地で眠れ

忘れない　いつまでも
強く　儚い　闘いの日を

永遠の風　語るだろう
いつか帰る場所
安らかな夢を…
弔いの歌 ～The beginning wind～

Rest, O weary souls, no more tales to tell
Bid the world a farewell, as it sinks into twilight

Ride upon the wind, eternity waits
For you gently to close your eyes
As you dream of the morning light

O tortured souls, your grief unending
Let its flame light the path ahead

Though you’ve nothing left, nothing to protect,
Though you walk on to your end

O noble souls, your sacrifices will be told
Songs of love and pain
Till my dying day, I’ll sing your refrain

Let it echo in my veins
Till the day when naught but peace will remain

Branded in our scars, rushing through our veins
Is the fear and the flame and the sharp tang of sadness

Only passing time can temper the pain
Soothing balm to the burning of war

In the evening sky
One more star tonight blinks its dying light
Burning brave as it fades down into ashes

In the tears it cries
Lives a guiding light, praise its will to fight

As we march ever onward
Step after step in this dark world
Looking on toward the horizon

Your light shines on, a beacon burning in the night
Showing us the way

O be proud, be true, these lessons from you
In our hearts, clear to this day

Oh, your melody
Will sound till sweet eternity, echo to the skies
Through my voice will ring the prayers you sing

For a new day to arise
For a road to lead us on to the light

O noble souls, your sacrifices will be told,
Will not be in vain

Though we’re forced to part, you live in our hearts
Leave your wishes in our hands
Let your weary bones return to the land

Hark, upon the wind, an eternal song
Of the blood, and the pain, and the fierce days of battle

Back into the earth your bones may have gone
But your souls are still burning bright
May your dreams be of peace and light
Song of Mourning: The Eternal Wind
Nadereh
